articles.title: Red Sox drop series to Nationals with 10-2 loss at Fenway
articles.description:
Boston closed a 5-2 homestand after sweeping a four-game series against the Yankees.

The post Red Sox drop series to Nationals with 10-2 loss at Fenway appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox lost 10-2 to the Nationals at Fenway on July 1.
Boston completed a 5-2 homestand after previously sweeping the Yankees.
This loss affects the team's momentum as they head into future games.

articles.title: Bruins reportedly acquire defenseman Will Borgen in trade with Rangers
articles.description:
Will Borgen is expected to slot into Boston's top-four on defense as a physical, right-shot blueliner.

The post Bruins reportedly acquire defenseman Will Borgen in trade with Rangers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins acquire defenseman Will Borgen from Rangers to strengthen their defense.
Borgen is a right-shot blueliner expected to join Boston's top-four defensemen.
This trade aims to enhance the Bruins' physical play ahead of the upcoming season.

articles.title: Celtics reportedly send Jaylen Brown to 76ers in stunning trade
articles.description:
Jaylen Brown played 10 seasons with the Celtics, winning NBA Finals MVP in 2024.

The post Celtics reportedly send Jaylen Brown to 76ers in stunning trade appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics trade Jaylen Brown to the 76ers after 10 seasons with the team.
Brown was named NBA Finals MVP in 2024, highlighting his impact on Boston.
This trade may affect Celtics' fan engagement and team dynamics in the upcoming season.

articles.title: Sewage overflow issue in Merrimack River is resolved, officials say, although some beaches are still closed
articles.description:
Officials are still urging people to avoid contact with the river near Haverhill and downstream for at least 48 hours.

The post Sewage overflow issue in Merrimack River is resolved, officials say, although some beaches are still closed appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Officials resolved the sewage overflow issue in the Merrimack River as of July 1.
Residents are advised to avoid river contact near Haverhill and downstream for 48 hours.
Some local beaches remain closed, affecting recreational access for Boston residents.

articles.title: NYPD memo outlines Taylor Swift wedding events at Madison Square Garden
articles.description:
Law enforcement officials in the city are preparing to monitor the pop star’s two-day event at Madison Square Garden, and several streets in the area will be closed.

The post NYPD memo outlines Taylor Swift wedding events at Madison Square Garden appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NYPD prepares for Taylor Swift's two-day wedding events at Madison Square Garden.
Several streets around Madison Square Garden will be closed during the events.
Boston residents may experience increased traffic as fans travel to New York City.

articles.title: Judge in Karen Read wrongful death suit probes leak of Proctor’s ‘sensitive’ information
articles.description:
“All people deserve fair and equal treatment in our system of justice, regardless of any personal characteristic — as abhorrent as some of them may be.”

The post Judge in Karen Read wrongful death suit probes leak of Proctor’s ‘sensitive’ information appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Judge investigates leak of sensitive information in Karen Read's wrongful death lawsuit.
Proctor's information deemed 'sensitive' raises concerns about fairness in the legal process.
Local residents worry about the implications for justice and transparency in Boston courts.

articles.title: Authorities charge 4 adults after 16 children rescued from dilapidated Ohio home
articles.description:
Some of the children discovered Tuesday were unable to speak and one — an 18 year-old who was developmentally disabled — could not even write her name, investigators said.

The post Authorities charge 4 adults after 16 children rescued from dilapidated Ohio home appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Authorities rescued 16 children from a dilapidated home in Ohio on Tuesday.
Four adults have been charged in connection with the children's neglect.
Boston residents should be aware of ongoing child welfare issues affecting vulnerable youth.
